title: 望梅止渴
meaning: 比喻用空想来安慰自己

scenes.title: 行军口渴
scenes.prompt: An army marching in hot sun, thirsty soldiers, cartoon style, desert scene
scenes.narration: 曹操带兵行军，士兵们都很口渴。

scenes.title: 说起梅子
scenes.prompt: A general talking about sour plums to soldiers, cartoon style, clever trick
scenes.narration: 曹操说前面有梅林，梅子又酸又甜。

scenes.title: 士兵流涎
scenes.prompt: Soldiers imagining plums and feeling less thirsty, cartoon style, imagination scene
scenes.narration: 士兵们想到梅子，口水都流出来了，也不那么渴了。
